title: 编辑距离
description: 给定两个单词 word1 和 word2，计算将 word1 转换成 word2 所需的最少操作数。允许插入、删除、替换一个字符。
inputFormat: 第一行是 word1。第二行是 word2。

referenceSolutions.python:
import sys

lines = sys.stdin.read().splitlines()
word1 = lines[0] if len(lines) > 0 else ''
word2 = lines[1] if len(lines) > 1 else ''
previous = list(range(len(word2) + 1))

for i, ch1 in enumerate(word1, 1):
    current = [i] + [0] * len(word2)
    for j, ch2 in enumerate(word2, 1):
        if ch1 == ch2:
            current[j] = previous[j - 1]
        else:
            current[j] = 1 + min(previous[j - 1], previous[j], current[j - 1])
    previous = current

print(previous[-1])
